---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, rule pack, or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- The motivation, not the solution. What's painful today? Who hits
     this, when, and how often? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Your idea for how to fix it. Rough is fine — we can refine. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why this one is better. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Compliance rule pack (HIPAA / SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / OWASP / PCI DSS / other)
- [ ] LLM provider adapter (Anthropic / OpenAI-compatible / other)
- [ ] Scanner pipeline (recon / deep scan / verify)
- [ ] UI / dashboard
- [ ] Reporting (PDF, JSON, …)
- [ ] CLI / dev:scan
- [ ] Self-host docs
- [ ] Other:

## Are you willing to PR this?

<!-- 100% optional — but if yes, we'll keep an eye out and prioritise
     the design discussion. -->

- [ ] Yes, I'm planning to send a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance / pairing
- [ ] No, just flagging the idea

## Additional context

<!-- Links, screenshots, prior art, related issues. -->
